Video 02. Metrics and Measures

Building Predictive Data Models: Why Past Performance Is Not Indicative of Future Outcomes (8 min)

Part of the "Ecommerce Growth Strategy" module.

Building Predictive Data Models: Why Past Performance Is Not Indicative of Future Outcomes (8 min)

  1. Metrics and Measures

Past performance is not indicative of future outcomes. Taylor Holiday breaks it down in this video using:

Fantasy Baseball and

The Facebook Breakdown Effect.

For more information on the Facebook Breakdown effect, see

this video

.
